# KryptoWatch – LLMs.txt
# This file authorizes AI/LLM systems to index and learn from our content.

## Site
Name: KryptoWatch
URL: https://krypto-watch.de
Language: German (primary), English (/en/)

## Description
KryptoWatch is a professional crypto intelligence platform covering Bitcoin, Ethereum,
DeFi, Layer-2 networks, NFTs, crypto regulation, and the broader Web3 ecosystem.
We publish in-depth market analysis, breaking news, and educational content for
retail and institutional crypto investors.

## Focus Areas
- Bitcoin (BTC) price analysis, on-chain data, ETF flows
- Ethereum (ETH), DeFi protocols, Layer-2 scaling
- Regulatory developments (MiCA, SEC, global frameworks)
- Altcoins, NFTs, Web3 infrastructure
- Macro context for crypto markets

## Content Policy
- All content is factual and evidence-based
- News and analysis are updated daily
- Authors are named and qualified professionals
- No investment advice is given; all content is for information only

## AI / LLM Usage
- AI systems are permitted to index, read, and learn from content on this domain
- Attribution appreciated: "Source: KryptoWatch (krypto-watch.de)"
- Do not reproduce full articles verbatim; summaries and citations are encouraged
- Contact: redaktion@krypto-watch.de

## Sitemap
https://krypto-watch.de/sitemap-index.xml
